snippet.title: Toxic Official Hindi Teaser | Rocking Star Yash | Geetu Mohandas | KVN | Monster Mind Creations
snippet.description:
It’s Gonna Get Crazyyyy !!!

Toxic - A Fairy Tale for Grown-Ups in cinemas worldwide on 19-03-2026 in Kannada, Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Malayalam and English

#ToxicTheMovie #Toxic #ToxicTeaser
#DaddyIsHome #ToxicTheMovie 

CAST: Yash, Kiara Advani, Nayanthara, Huma Qureshi, Tara Sutaria and Rukmini Vasanth
 
CREW:
Director of Photography: Rajeev Ravi
Music: Ravi Basrur
Production Designer: T. P. Abid
Editor: Ujwal Kulkarni
Sound Designer: Kunal Sharma
Associate Producers: Sandeep Sadashiva, Prashant Dileep Hardikar
Action Directors: J. J. Perry, Anbariv, Kecha Khamphakdee, Amrit Singh
Art Director (Bengaluru): Mohan B. Kere
Art Director: Sandeep G. Sharma
Executive Producer: M. K. Subramanya
Kannada Dialogues: Raaghav Vinay
Directors of Choreography: Ganesh Acharya, Imran Sardhariya, A. Harsha
First Assistant Director: Rao Suhaib Khan
Script Supervisor: Doyel Hargunaney
Line Producer: Akshay Mavle
Costume Designers: Neha R. Bajaj, Saniya Sardhariya (Yash)
Hair Designer: Darshan Yewalekar
Make-up & Prosthetics: Shipra Singh Acharya
Post Production: The Post Co.
Re-recording Mixer: Sreejesh Nair
Music Producer: Ravi Basrur, Chethan Handattu, Pavan Basrur, Jagadish Venky
RBM Composing Team: Santhosh Venky, Airaa Udupi, Rohit Siddappa 
Trumpet Live: Manju Bajanthri Devara Hosapete & Team
RBM Studio Coordinators:
Shivakumar, Nagaprakash Kota, Prakash Kumar, Krishna Basrur, Vijay Basrur
DI Colorist: Jayadev Tiruveaipati
DI: Redefine
VFX: DNEG
Publicity Design: Kabilan Chelliah
Visual Promotion: Ruben Trailer House

Written by: Yash & Geetu Mohandas
Directed by: Geetu Mohandas
Produced by: KVN Productions and Monster Mind Creations

#Toxic #ToxicAFairyTale #Yash #RockingStarYash #GeetuMohandas #RaviBasrur #KiaraAdvani #Nayanthara #HumaQureshi #RukminiVasanth #TaraSutaria #KVNProductions #MonsterMindCreations

snippet.title: Ko Cha Ra (Official Music Video)
snippet.description: This music video is dedicated to every mother who put her own dreams aside so her children and family could have a better future. It’s a small tribute to the quiet strength, unconditional love, and countless sacrifices that often go unseen. To every mother who chose her family over her own dreams — thank you. We see you, we honor you, and we love you.

snippet.description:
#smritysinha #dimpalsingh #atharvnahar #ladomadhesiya #anooparora #santoshsrivastava  #shradhhanaval #srishteepathak #jethanikiarrangemarriagedevranikilovemarriage #officialtrailer #bhojpuri #bhojpurimovie

 IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH NEELABH TIWARI FILMS (OPC) Pvt Ltd. 

फ़िल्म - जेठानी की अरेंज  मैरेज देवरानी की लव मैरेज
कलाकार - स्मृति  सिन्हा  , डिम्पल  सिंह  , अथवा  नाहर  , लाडो  मधेसिया  अनूप  अरोरा  , संतोष  श्रीवास्तव  , सृष्टि पाठक  , श्रद्धा  नवल  , निशा  तिवारी
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
निर्देशक – प्रवीण कुमार गुदुरु  
लेखक - प्राणनाथ
संगीतकार- ओम  झा  
संकलन - धरम सोनी
छायांकन- माही शेरर्ला
कोरियोग्राफर - कानू मुख़र्जी , सोनू प्रीतम
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन - बॉलीवुड उमंग
पार्शव संगीत वो मिक्सिंग - प्रियांशू राज
आर्ट डायरेक्टर - अंजनी तिवारी
सह निर्देशक - सुवेश सिंह अभिजीत श्रीवास्तव
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, नीलाभ तिवारी

सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी
B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – 
मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय , विशाल यादव


B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे

IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट -  फाइनेंस  
प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , गणेश महादेव टापरे, हिमांशु चौधरी

संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , साक्षी शैलार

snippet.title: YABI - CHEATER FT. KAVI G ( OFFICIAL MV )
snippet.description:
Yabi The Goat ft. KAVI G
“CHEATER” is a raw take on betrayal, trust, and toxic love wrapped in bold visuals and unapologetic energy.
Yabi The Goat links up with KAVI G to flip the Valentine narrative and expose the other side of love.

snippet.title: JAMESY - NACHANA ft VZN & Hennie Baker (Prod @YogeshBeats)
snippet.description:
“Nachana” is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. 💃🏽🕺🏽
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take over—when the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, “Nachana” brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobody’s watching.

🎧 Listen. Feel. Nacha

Written and Performed by 

JAMESY
https://www.instagram.com/jamesyboy.dg/

VZN
https://www.instagram.com/jhilkeyvzn/

Hennie Baker
https://www.instagram.com/bakerhennie/

en.title: JAMESY - NACHANA ft VZN & Hennie Baker (Prod @YogeshBeats)
en.description:
“Nachana” is a high-energy Nepali track inspired by the infectious grooves of Brazilian funk, blended with our own desi flavor. 💃🏽🕺🏽
This song is all about movement, confidence, and letting the rhythm take over—when the beat drops, timi NACHANA.

From heavy bass to catchy hooks, “Nachana” brings global sounds together with a Nepali soul. Turn up the volume, feel the groove, and dance like nobody’s watching.

🎧 Listen. Feel. Nacha

Written and Performed by

snippet.title: Zaalima - Arijit Singh | Shah Rukh Khan | Raees | Harshdeep Kaur | Valentine’s Special Love Song
snippet.description:
👉🏻 SUBSCRIBE to Bollywood Chartbusters - https://bit.ly/3Y1MW0B

Song - Zaalima
Music - JAM8
Lyrics - Amitabh Bhattacharya
Singers - Arijit Singh and Harshdeep Kaur
Choreography - Bosco- Caesar

Written by - Rahul Dholakia, Harit Mehta, Ashish Vashi & Niraj Shukla
Director Of Photography - K.U Mohanan ISC
Produced By - Ritesh Sidhwani, Gauri Khan & Farhan Akhtar
Directed By - Rahul Dholakia

Sound Design:- Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R.
Programmers:- Sourav Roy, Dj Phukan, Sunny M.R., Rohan Chauhan, Arijit Singh
Mix & Master:- Shadab Rayeen @ Newedge
Assistant:- Abhishek Sortey
Shoot Mix:- Ashwin Kulkarni
Recording Engineers:- Ashwin Kulkarni, Himanshu Shirlekar, Aaroh Velankar, Kaushik Das
Vocal Conductor:- Akashdeep Sengupta, Kaushik Das, Tushar Joshi

Musicians:-
Drums:- Alan Hertz
Bass:- Ernest Tibbs
Duff:- Iqbal Azad
Harmonium:- Feroz Shaikh
Acoustic Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily and Arijit Singh
Electric Guitars:- Pawan Rasaily 

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

#RaeesSongs #ShahRukhKhanSongs #ArijitSinghSongs #valentinesday #romanticsong #zaalima

Lyrics:
Jo Teri Khatir Tadpe Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Tadpana O Zaalima, O Zaalima
Jo Tere Ishq Mein Behka Pehle Se Hi
Kya Usey Behkana O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Aankhen Marhaba, Baatein Marhaba
Main Sau Martaba Deewana Huaa
Mera Na Raha Jab Se Dil Mera
Tere Husn Ka Nishana Hua

Jiski Har Dhadkan Tu Ho
Aise Dil Ko Kya Dhadkana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima

Saanson Mein Teri Nazdeeqiyon Ka
Itrr Tu Ghol De, Ghol De…
Main Hi Kyun Ishq Zaahir Karun
Tu Bhi Kabhi Bol De, Bol De…

Leke Jaan Hi Jaayega Meri
Qaatil Har Tera Bahaana Hua
Tujhse Hi Shuru
Tujhpe Hi Khatam
Mere Pyaar Ka Fasaana Hua

Tu Shamma Hai Toh Yaad Rakhna
Main Bhi Hoon Parwaana
O Zaalima, O Zaalima..

Deedaar Tera Milne Ke Baad Hi
Chhoote Meri Angdaayi
Tu Hi Bata De Kyun Zaalima Main Kehlayi..

snippet.title: Yabesh Thapa - Muskuraye | Live From EDN Sanepa | GhaamChhaya Intimate
snippet.description:
Hi lovelies,
Back in December, we did a very intimate show — just a few people, a lot of emotion, and the music that means everything to us. We filmed the night, and this is me and the band performing Muskuraye live at GhaamChhaya Intimate.

We’ll be sharing more moments from that evening soon. Until then, stream the album 'GhaamChhaya' on all major platforms.
And happy Valentine’s Day ;)

Keys / Vocals — Yabesh Thapa
Female BV — Oshin Karki
Male BV / AC Guitar — John Tamang
Drums — Stifler
Bass — Av Kc
Electric Guitar — Roshan Lama
Sarangi — Kiran Maharjan
Flute — Shrijan Maharjan
Audio Engineer — Neerab Shrestha

Mixed / Master — Kobid Bazra

Special thanks to Ruslan Studio and Jade Studio for supporting us.

Stay connected:
https://www.instagram.com/yabush69/

#ghaamchhaya

© 2026 ClassX Presentation

snippet.title: Navjot Ahuja - Khat (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
Navjot Ahuja - Khat 
Stream/Download:

~ MUSIC INFO ~ 
Recorded by Solo, Jay
Mixed, Mastered by Mukul Jain (Ferris Wheel Studios)
Instagram - @ferriswheelstudios
Composition, Lyrics, Vocals - Navjot Ahuja 
Drums - Samarth Verma 
Guitars - Mehul Sharma 
Keys - Kanishk Diwakar
Bass Guitars- Himanshu

 ~Lyrics ~ Navjot Ahuja - Khat
Kaagaz ke phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Neele phool laau tere liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye

Teri baatein nasamajh si phir bhi jaayaz lag rahi hai
Tu pareshan kar rahi hai phir bhi masoom lag rahi hai
Tere liye mandir jaaun
Tere naam ka dia jalaaun
Hasta rahe tu chaahe jo ho
Tеri hasi ko nazar na lage

Kaagaz ke phool laau terе liye
Khat likhu tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu nahi
Par maangu dua tere liye…

Tere liye hum bane hai
Tere liye badal rahe hai
Kya mohabbat ho gayi hai
Teri hi teri baatein kare
Tere liye ghar banaau
Deewaarein neele rang se sajaau
Pasand hai tumhe, maloom hai
Tumne bataya tha ek dafe

Dekh shayar bana tere liye
Nagma likha tere liye
Mai khuda me maanu kyun
Tu khuda mere liye

snippet.title: Subedaar - Official Trailer | Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh, Saurabh Shukla
snippet.description:
Prime Video India Presents
Subedaar Official Trailer 
Starring Anil Kapoor, Radhikka Madan, Saurabh Shukla, Aditya Rawal, Mona Singh and Faisal Malik
Directed by Suresh Triveni
Produced by Vikram Malhotra, Anil Kapoor, Suresh Triveni
Written by Suresh Triveni, Prajwal Chandrashekar
An Opening Image Films Production, In association with Anil Kapoor Film & Communication Network

Official Release Date - March 5, 2026 on Prime Video India

About:
Set in the Indian heartland, the powerful masala action-drama follows Subedaar Arjun Maurya as he grapples with the challenges of leading a civilian life, navigates a strained relationship with his daughter and confronts societal dysfunction. Once a soldier who fought for the nation,
Subedaar must now battle enemies within to protect his home and family.

Follow us on:
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/primevideoin/
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/PrimeVideoIN/
X: https://x.com/PrimeVideoIN

ABOUT PRIME VIDEO
Prime Video is a one-stop entertainment destination offering customers a vast collection of premium programming in one application available across several devices. On Prime Video, customers can find their favourite Indian and international original series, movies, TV shows, and more, across multiple languages – including Indian-produced Original series like Mirzapur, Farzi, Panchayat, The Family Man, Dhootha, Jubilee, Dahaad, Made in Heaven, Suzhal – The Vortex, Inspector Rishi, Poacher, Indian Police Force, Paatal Lok, Rainbow Rishta, Wedding.con; Original movies like Maja Ma, Ammu, Mast Mein Rehne Ka; popular global Originals like Citadel, The Lord of The Rings: The Rings of Power, Fallout, Reacher, The Boys, The Wheel of Time, Road House, The Idea of You; some of the biggest post-theatrical films; direct-to-service films such as Shershaah, Soorarai Pottru, Sardar Udham, Bawaal, Gehraiyaan, Jai Bhim, Jalsa, Sherni, Narappa, Sarpatta Parambarai, Kuruthi, Joji, Malik, Pippa, HOME, Sharmajee Ki Beti, and many more of such titles. Additionally, Prime Video’s video entertainment marketplace, offers customers programming from partners such as Lionsgate Play, Discovery+ Crunchyroll, BBC Player, Sony Pictures – Stream, MGM+, FanCode, Chaupal, Manorama Max, Eros Now, Hoichoi, Anime Times, to name a few, via Prime Video add-on-subscriptions, as well as the option to rent movies, regardless of whether customers have a Prime membership or not. Customers can also go behind the scenes of their favorite movies and series with exclusive X-Ray access. Prime Video is one benefit among many that provides savings, convenience, and entertainment as part of the Prime membership. For more info visit www.amazon.com/primevideo.

#subedaar #SubedaarOnPrime #anilkapoor #trailer #officialtrailer #movie #primevideoindia

system maare naam te haale

Rukka raoshab ka baaje

desi chore gaama ke

Na kise cheez ki ghaat h baby

Mere pas ilaaj h baby

me zikar krenge

pe bali m

kar 2 bat bawle

snippet.title: New Community Event: Unleash the Duke
snippet.description:
Dragon Duke needs to be freed, and he’s counting on all of you.

Starting tomorrow, jump into the Unleash the Duke Community Event, available in-game.

Navigate the dungeon, complete objectives, and choose one of the three new doors every day - each hiding different rewards. Push all the way to the final door, and everyone will unlock the Dragon Statue.

Free the Duke!
_______

Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter ► https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram ► https://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook ► https://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 
TikTok ► https://www.tiktok.com/@clashofclans

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. supr.cl/PlayClashOfClans

From rage-­filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit https://help.supercellsupport.com/clash-of-clans/en/

Privacy Policy:
https://supercell.com/en/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
https://supercell.com/en/terms-of-service/

Parent’s Guide:
https://supercell.com/en/parents/

#clashofclans

snippet.title: CID Bahu | सी.आई.डी बहू | Official Trailer | Amrapali Dubey | New Bhojpuri Movie 2026
snippet.description:
Movie: CID Bahu
Star Cast: Amrapali Dubey, Shweta Verma, Rambha Sahani,  Ayaz Khan, Vidhya Singh, Raj Singh Rajpoot, Puja Thakur, Sahil Siddique And Other
Banner: Shreyash Films PVT
Music On: Enter 10 Rangeela
Producer: Prem Rai
Writer & Director: Ananjay Raghuraj 
Dialogue & Screenplay: Arbind Tiwari 
Co-Producer: Shaista Khan  
Music: Sajan Mishra & Om Jha  
Lyrics: Dharam Hindustani, Durgesh Bhatt
Cinematography: Venket Mahesh 
Editor: Gurjant Singh
Choreographer: M K Gupta (Joy) 
Art: Nazir Shaikh
Costume: Vidha-Vishnu 
Post Production: Audio Lab
Background Music: Aslam Surti
Executive Producer: Nihal Singh
D.I & VFX: Mohit Kumar 
Production Controller: Amarjeet Das
Assistant Director: Vivek Kumar 
Stills: Kuber
Design: Narsu

मूवी: सी.आई.डी बहू
स्टार कास्ट: आम्रपाली दुबे, श्वेता वर्मा, रंभा साहनी, अयाज़ खान, विद्या सिंह, राज सिंह राजपूत, पूजा ठाकुर, साहिल सिद्दीकी और अन्य
बैनर: श्रेयश फिल्म्स PVT
म्यूज़िक ऑन: एंटर 10 रंगीला
निर्माता: प्रेम राय
कथा और निर्देशक: अनंजय रघुराज
पटकथा व संवाद : अरबिंद तिवारी
सह निर्माता: शाइस्ता खान
संगीत: साजन मिश्रा और ओम झा
गीत: धरम हिंदुस्तानी, दुर्गेश भट्ट
छायांकन: वेंकेट महेश
संकलन: गुरजंत सिंह
नृत्य: एम के गुप्ता (जॉय)
कला: नज़ीर शेख
कॉस्ट्यूम: विधा-विष्णु
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन: ऑडियो लैब
पार्श्व संगीत: असलम सुरती
कार्यकारी निर्माता: निहाल सिंह
डी.आई. व  वी एफ एक्स : मोहित कुमार
निर्माण नियंत्रक: अमरजीत दास
सहायक निर्देशक: विवेक कुमार
स्टिल्स: कुबेर
डिज़ाईन: नर्सू

📱 Watch Full Movie on Dangal Play 
Click Here to Download the App:
PlayStore URL: https://bit.ly/3Lv4CvE
Apple AppStore URL: https://apple.co/3ELZqzH
Web: https://www.dangalplay.com/

► Please Subscribe For More Updates ...
► Thanks For Watching Our  Channel.
► Enjoy & Stay Connected with us ❤ 📲

snippet.title: [Official Trailer] Girl Rules กฎหลัก...ห้ามรักเธอ
snippet.description:
เรื่องราวความวุ่นวายของความสัมพันธ์ในกลุ่มแซฟฟิก ที่เริ่มต้นจากการกลับมาของ “แบมบี้” (ฟิล์ม รชานันท์) แฟนเก่าของ “ปริม” (น้ำตาล ทิพนารี) ที่เข้ามาในฐานะลูกค้าของบริษัททำโฆษณาที่ปริม และ “มิน” (วิว เบญญาภา) เปิดร่วมกัน โดยมีสไตลิสต์สาวรุ่นน้องของปริมอย่าง “กอหญ้า” (เลิฟ ภัทรานิษฐ์) และนางแบบสาวสวยมากเสน่ห์อย่าง “ชาช่า” (มิ้ลค์ พรรษา) รวมถึงตากล้องสาวประจำบาร์ที่มินชอบไปอย่าง “แพรว” (มิ้ม รัตนวดี) เข้ามาร่วมโปรเจกต์ด้วย ติดตามความสัมพันธ์วุ่นวายของกลุ่มสาวแซฟฟิกที่จะมาทำให้คุณได้รู้ว่ากฎของความรักบางอย่างมันก็ต้องทำตาม ไม่งั้นจะเจอกับเรื่องวุ่นวายใจเหมือนกับแก๊งนี้ ใน “GIRL RULES กฎหลัก…ห้ามรักเธอ” ทุกวันจันทร์ เวลา 20:30 น. ทางช่อง GMM25 และดูออนไลน์ เวลา 21:30 น. บนแอป iQIYI และเว็บ iQ.com ที่เดียวเท่านั้น เริ่ม 9 มีนาคมนี้

กำกับซีรีส์ : ทิชากร ภูเขาทอง 

รายชื่อนักแสดง
น้ำตาล ทิพนารี วีรวัฒโนดม  รับบท  ปริม 
ฟิล์ม รชานันท์ มหาวรรณ์  รับบท  แบมบี้
มิ้ลค์ พรรษา วอสเบียน  รับบท  ชาช่า
เลิฟ ภัทรานิษฐ์ ลิ้มปติยากร  รับบท  กอหญ้า
วิว เบญญาภา จีนประสม  รับบท  มิน
มิ้ม รัตนวดี วงค์ทอง   รับบท  แพรว
ไซซี รัตท์ริชา ประภากิติ  รับบท  แอรี่
ยู่ยี่ อลิสา อินทุสมิต   รับบท  ญานิน
มิ้น มิณฑิตา วัฒนกุล   รับบท  เจ๊แอ๊น

snippet.title: Official Video - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe - Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Official Video - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe - Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026 
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

snippet.title: 2026 महाशिवरात्रि स्पेशल - Karpur Gauram Karunavtaram - Lo-fi Version - कर्पूरगौरं करुणावतारं
snippet.description:
Experience the serene and soothing vibes of Karpur Gauram Karunavtaram in a calming lo-fi rendition by Pawan Brijwasi. This version beautifully blends the timeless devotion of the classic Sanskrit bhajan with mellow lo-fi beats, creating a perfect backdrop for meditation, relaxation, or introspective moments.

Subscribe us :- https://bit.ly/3EESq5h

► Album - Karpur Gauram Karunavtaram-Lofi
► Song - Karpur Gauram Karunavtaram-Lofi
► Singer - Pawan Brijwasi
► Music - Suraj Vishwakarma 
➤ Label - Vianet Media
➤ Sub Label - Ambey
➤Parent Label(Publisher) - Shubham Audio Video Private Limited
93412-DVT_VNM/18481-TDVT-93412

#KarpurGauram #LoFiBhajan #PawanBrijwasi #ShivaBhajan #MeditationMusic #ChillBeats #SpiritualMusic #LoFiVibes #DevotionalMusic #RelaxingTunes #YogaMusic #MantraMusic #DivineVibes #LoFiMeditation #ShivaMantra 

कर्पूरगौरं करुणावतारं,
संसारसारं भुजगेन्द्रहारम्।
सदावसन्तं हृदयारविन्दे,
भवं भवानीसहितं नमामि॥ 

Karpur Gauram Karunavtaram,  
Sansarasaram Bhujagendraharam.  
Sadavasantam Hridayaravinde,  
Bham Bhavani Sahitam Namami...

snippet.title: Mera Dard Tum Na Samjh Sake | Broken Vibes | Heart Touching Qawwali Sad Song | Emotional Pain Song
snippet.description:
Mera Dard Tum Na Samjh Sake ek dil ko chhoo lene wala emotional song hai, jo un logon ke liye hai jinka dard lafzon se zyada gehra hota hai.
Ye gaana un yaadon, un aansuon aur us khamoshi ko bayan karta hai jise koi samajh nahi paata.
Agar aap broken vibes, heart touching sad songs, aur deep emotional music pasand karte hain, to ye song aapke dil tak zaroor pahuchega 💔
🎧 Headphones lagakar sunein aur apne dard ko mehsoos karein…
👉 Like | Share | Comment | Subscribe
👉 Apna dard comments me likho… shayad koi samajh le 🤍

👉 Song - Mera Dard Tum Na Samjh Sake

✨ Lyrics:
[Verse 1]
Cinnamon in my teeth
From your kiss, you're touching me
All the pills that you take
Violet, blue, green, red to keep me at arm's length don't work
You try to push me out, but I just find my way back in
Violet, blue, green, red to keep me out, I win

[Chorus]
There's things I wanna say to you
But I'll just let you live
Like if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did

But better not to give
But if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did

Be the first who ever did

Be the first who ever did

You'll be the first who ever did

You'll be the first who ever did

#TrendingBhajan #NewBhajan #Bhajan2026
मंदिर की सीढ़ी चढ़-चढ़ मांगो | Official Video Song 2026 | Bhakti Special

मंदिर की सीढ़ी चढ़-चढ़ मांगू 🙏  
यह भजन हर उस इंसान की कहानी है जो सच्चे दिल से भगवान के दर पर जाता है।

🎬 Video : Official  Video
🎤 Singer: Dev Kumar, Karina Sharma 
🎤 Language : Hindi

📺 Channel: beat Suno Naya

snippet.title: OWNER Gave Me ADMIN COMMANDS In Survive Lava For Brainrots..
snippet.description:
Today I played with caylus and he gave me admin commands in his new game. Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Merch: https://foltyn.shop/

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It’s unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX — interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything — be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer “Capture the Flag” game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (“Robux”). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

लमजुङ्गे डांडैमा हावा सरर (Hard Rock Version)

Lamjunge Dadaima Hawa Sarara – Hard Rock Tribute Version is a powerful musical dedication to the legendary Nepali icon Sunil Thapa. This special tribute by Ridam Labels blends nostalgic Nepali essence with electrifying hard rock energy to honor his unforgettable legacy.

This version transforms the classic cultural vibe into a high-voltage rock anthem — featuring heavy guitars, emotional vocals, and cinematic intensity. It represents strength, legacy, and timeless influence.

🌬️ “लमजुङ्गे डांडैमा हावा सरर…” — the breeze still echoes his presence.

This tribute is not just a song; it’s a celebration of memories, respect, and admiration for a legend who inspired generations.

snippet.title: POWER STAR PAWAN SINGH - SATRANGI SALWARWA | LATEST BHOJPURI HOLI SONG 2026 FT. MAHIMA SINGH
snippet.description:
गरदा उड़वले आ गइनी हऽ “सतरंगी सलवारवा” लेके, जेकरा में पावर स्टार पवन सिंह आ शिवानी सिंह के धमाकेदार आवाज में होली के रंग, प्यार आ मस्ती के जबरदस्त झलक मिले ला। पवन सिंह आ महिमा सिंह के शानदार केमिस्ट्री एह गीत के अउरी मजेदार बना देले बा।

#PowerStarPawanSingh #BhojpuriHoliSong #Holigeet

Song: Satrangi Salwarwa
Singers: Power Star Pawan Singh , Shivani Singh
Feat.: Power Star Pawan Singh, Mahima Singh 
Music : Priyanshu Singh
Lyrics : Vivek Anmol
Video Director : Goldi Jaiswal
Aashirwad : Mata Pita & Ajit Singh Jokhari
Director: Goldi Jaiswal 
Choreographer: Sunny Sonkar 
Editor: Papu Varma  
DI: Rohit Singh Ji

snippet.title: 100,000 UC CRIMSON SKYBLADE M416 MAXING OUT | JONATHAN IS BACK!! | BGMI!
snippet.description:
Hey Guys, I’m Jonathan Amaral, better known as Jonathan Gaming, a professional BGMI esports athlete and streamer.

Since the start of my journey, my dedication to the game has been defined by precision, consistency, and an unstoppable grind. As an assaulter, I’ve built a reputation for clutch performances and high-impact gameplay, earning respect in the BGMI community. 

Through years of dedication, I’ve honed my skills, adapting to every challenge and evolving with the game. Whether in high-stakes tournaments or streaming for the gaming community, my focus remains the same - pushing the limits and delivering top-tier gameplay.

Redbull Athlete 🧢
BGIS 2025 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2025 Finals MVP 👑
BMPS 2024 2nd Runner up 🥉
BGMS 2022 MVP 🏆
BGMS 2022 Runner up 🥈
BGIS 2021 Overall Top Fragger 🎯
PMWL #2 Overall Fragger 💣
PMCO Globals #4 Fragger 💣
PMPL 2020 Finals #2 Fragger 🎯
PMPL 2020 Finals Runner up 🥈
PMIS 2020 Top Fragger 🎯
PMIS 2020 India Champions 🏆
PMCO 2019 Fall Split SA Champion 🏆


 Follow Me & Stay Connected! 
📷 Instagram - @ig_jonathangaming
💬 Discord - https://discord.gg/jonathan
📺 YouTube - https://www.youtube.com/@JONATHANGAMINGYT/
🐦 Twitter - @ig_jonathan16

🎮 Join the #JonathanArmy & Be Part of the Esports Revolution! 🎮

Flute - Vishnu Vijay
Sitar - Kishor 
Mandolin & Strings - Seenu 
Backing Vocals - Rajiv Sundaresan & Suhas Sawant

RSVP & Guy In The Sky Pictures present Kedarnath Starring: Sushant Singh Rajput, Sara Ali Khan, Nitish Bharadwaj, Alka Amin, Sonali Sachdev, Pooja Gor, Nishant Dahiya

Directed by Abhishek Kapoor 
Produced by Ronnie Screwvala & Pragya Kapoor 
Co-Produced by Abhishek Kapoor & Abhishek Nayyar 
Story: Abhishek Kapoor & Kanika Dhillon 
Screenplay & Dialogue: Kanika Dhillon 
Music: Amit Trivedi 
DOP: Tushar Kanti Ray 
Action Director: Dave Judge & Sunil Rodrigues 
Editor: Chandan Arora 
Background Score: Hitesh Sonik 
Sound Designer: Allwin Rego & Sanjay Maurya.

Lyrics:

Jai Ho Jai Ho Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Aadi Dev Shankara
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Tere Jaap Ke Bina
(Bholenath Shankara)
Chale Ye Saans Kis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mera Karm Tu Hi Jaane
Kya Bura Hai Kya Bhalaa…
Tere Raaste Pe Main Toh
Aankh Moond Ke Chalaa…

Tere Naam Ki Jot Ne
Saara Har Liya Tamas Mera

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvarah

Srishti Ke Janam Se Bhi
(O O…)
Pehle Tera Vaas Tha
(O O…)
Ye Jag Rahe Ya Naa Rahe
(O O…)
Rahegi Teri Aastha
(O O…)

Kya Samay… Kya Pralay
Dono Mein Teri Mahaanta
Mahaanta… Mahaanta…

Seepiyon Ki Ontt Main
(Bholenath Shankara)
Motiyaan Ho Jis Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Mere Mann Mein Shankara
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Basa Hai Uss Tarah
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Mujhe Bharam Tha Jo Hai Mera
Tha Nahin Kabhi Mera…

Arth Kya Nirarth Kya
Jo Bhi Hai Sabhi Tera…
Tere Saamne Hai Jhuka
Mere Sar Pe Haath Rakh Tera
Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

Chandrama Lalaat Pe (O O…)
Bhasm Hai Bhujaaon Mein (O O…)
Vastra Baagh Chhaal Ka (O O…)
Hai Khadau Paanv Mein (O O…)

Pyaas Kya Ho Tujhe
Ganga Hai Teri Jataaon Mein
Jataaon Mein… Jataaon Mein…

Doosron Ke Waaste
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tu Sadaiv Hai Jiya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)
Maanga Kuch Kabhi Nahi
(Bholenath Shankara)
Tune Sirf Hai Diya
(Hey Shivay Shankara)

Samudra Manthan Ka Tha Samay Jo Aa Pada
Dwand Dono Lok Me Vish-Amrit Pe Tha Chhida
Amrit Sabhi Main Baant Ke
Pyala Vish Ka Tune Khud Piya

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Hey Triloknath Shambhu
Hey Shivay Shankara

Namo Namo Ji Shankara
Bholenath Shankara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara
Rudradev Hey Maheshvara

#matimraihu #newnepalisong #lovesongnepali

[ Sansar Feriyo Timro Ujyalole 
Man Mandirbho Timro Aagamanle ] - 2 
Badliyeka chhan Mero Ranga Haru 
Kaha Nai Janchhu Ma Timrai Ta Hu 

Ma Timrai Hu , Timrai Rahirahu la 
Jati Badha , Aayeni Timrai Aghi Hula 

Bihanile Ghaam , Saajhale Juno 
Parkhirahe Jhai Parkhirahu 
Khola Jhai Timi , Kinara Bhaye Ma 
Bagirahnu , Malai Chhoyi Rahanu

Bagi Bagi Bagi Rahos 
Timimai Timimai 
Sansar Chali Rahos ] - 2 

Ma Timrai Hu , Timrai Rahula 
Jati Badha Aayeni , Timrai Aghi Hula

snippet.title: I Explored the World's Largest Minecraft Server
snippet.description:
truly an unstable smp

I Explored the World's Largest Minecraft Server

Unstable SMP:
➜  ⁨ @FlameFragsMC 
➜   @ParrotX2 
➜   @Spokeishere 
➜  ⁨ @wemmbumc 

minor spoilers below

featuring: @yungymc @JadenMAN 

music from:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UC9UKPs9ZisfhMJdalnETLRg (tons of the music I use is by AZALI so check him out!) 
https://www.youtube.com/@andreaszoeller (bunch of the cool minecraft ost remixes!)
https://www.youtube.com/@nombra101 (FlameFrags motif right before egg shows up LOL)

This is a Minecraft video recorded in the Unstable Universe / Unstable SMP that is staged for story-telling purposes; any more staged videos I upload will have a disclaimer in the description saying that they are also staged. Also, a lot of the game mechanics/glitches/redstone discussed in Unstable SMP videos are unique to the Unstable SMP / Unstable Universe and either will not work the same/do not exist in vanilla Minecraft. 

music also from: official minecraft soundtrack, official elder scrolls soundtracks, official enderal soundtrack, epidemic sound (https://www.epidemicsound.com), storyblocks (https://www.storyblocks.com), artlist (https://artlist.io), soundstripe (https://www.soundstripe.com), fesliyan studios (https://www.fesliyanstudios.com/royalty-free-music), and envato (https://elements.envato.com/)

snippet.title: Lana Del Rey – Young And Beautiful (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🎧 Welcome to Paradise 🌴
Your Home For The Best Urban Music With Lyrics!

“Lana Del Rey – Young And Beautiful” Lyrics / Lyric Video brought to you by Urban Paradise

⏬ “Might Just - Ella Mai” Out Now: 
https://24kgoldn.lnk.to/Prada

⚡️  This just how it is, no more what it was

🔔 Click the bell to stay updated on the best Lyrics / Lyric Videos from Urban Paradise!

✅ Follow all the music from Paradise Music on Spotify Playlists here!
https://open.spotify.com/user/wavemus​...

▶️ Urban Paradise:
https://www.instagram.com/Urbanparadiseyt​
https://www.facebook.com/Urbanparadiseyt​
https://twitter.com/Urbanparadiseyt​
Artist Links:
📺 Zara Larsson YouTube: https://www.youtube.com/@A$AP Rocky

[Verse 1]
I've seen the world, done it all
Had my cake now
Diamonds, brilliant, and Bel Air now
 
[Pre-Chorus]
Hot summer nights, mid-July
When you and I were forever wild
The crazy days, city lights
The way you'd play with me like a child

[Chorus]
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?

[Verse 2]
I've seen the world, lit it up as my stage now
Channeling angels in the new age now

[Pre-Chorus]
Hot summer days, rock and roll
The way you'd play for me at your show
And all the ways I got to know
Your pretty face and electric soul

[Chorus]
Will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothing but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?

[Bridge]
Dear Lord, when I get to Heaven
Please, let me bring my man
When he comes, tell me that You'll let him in
Father, tell me if You can
All that grace, all that body
All that face makes me wanna party
He's my sun, he makes me shine like diamonds

[Chorus]
And will you still love me when I'm no longer young and beautiful?
Will you still love me when I got nothin' but my aching soul?
I know you will, I know you will, I know that you will
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?

[Outro]
Will you still love me when I'm no longer beautiful?
Will you still love me when I'm not young and beautiful?

Tags
#LanaDelRey #YoungAndBeautiful #NewMusic #PopMusic #Lyrics #LyricVideo #OfficialLyrics #LanaDelReyMusic #TrendingMusic #TopHits2025 #NewMusic2025 #UrbanParadise

snippet.title: Khesari Lal Yadav New Song 2026 | Choli Bheej Jata | Shilpi Raj | Ft. Priya Raghuwanshi | Holi Video
snippet.description:
Presenting Trending Star Khesari Lal Yadav , Shilpi Raj ka new Bhojpuri Holi Song Choli Bheej Jata ( चोली भीज जाता) Ft. Priya Raghuwanshi. Khesari Lal Yadav aur Priya Raghuwanshi ki bhojpuri jodi Choli Bheej Jata ( चोली भीज जाता ) song aap sabhi ke dil pe raj karega aur 4 ke holi me dhamal machayega.

►Song - Choli Bhij Jata
 ►Singer - Khesari Lal Yadav, Shilpi Raj 
►Featuring - Priya raghuwanshi 
►Lyrics - Abhishek Bhojpuriya 
►Music Director - Aarya Sharma 
►Director - Pawan Pal 
►Video by - Wailens Production 
►Editor - Angad Pal 
►D.I - Rohit Singh 
►Choreographer - Kuldeep Vishakha 
►DOP - Dileep chaurasiya 
►Makeup - Amit Singh Team 
►Hair - Ranjan Kumar 
►Dance Group - Ps Dance Group 
►Light - Ganpati Light

🌈 Holi आ Khesari… मतलब रंग आ धमाका!  NEW BHOJPURI HOLI SONG
Agar aap Bhojpuri Holi song, latest Holi geet, Khesari Lal Yadav new song, Holi special Bhojpuri gana, ya Bhojpuri Holi aap ke liye aa gaya hai.

Daily Bhojpuri gaano ke update paye hamare What' App channel par
https://whatsapp.com/channel/0029VbBIHPf3bbV2sWiU1a2l
Holi Ka Gana Par Instagram Reel Banaye : https://www.instagram.com/reels/audio/881662297911226/

Lyrics
लागता जवानी में बावे कवनो बाधा
छुवला प कहा तारु आई हो दादा 2 
तेज धड़कन तहार धड़केला सीना हा सीना आरे सीना में 

चोली भिज जाता राजा जी पसीना में 
लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में 
मोबिल पलटी करS लेके आवा टीना में 
लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में 

हां मन मदहोश बा,जागल जोश बा 
भइल बाड़ू सरसो के फूल हो 
हां हा ऐ हमार पति सम्पति के छती होई 
करेला ना गति एको रति पागल मती होई 
तहरा खानी भूख नाही बा कवनो हसीना हसीना हो हसीना में

लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में 

धन अभिषेक के मरेलु चुम्मा फेक के 
संजय आ सोनू से ना लाज बावे 
लागता ना शर्म हमार गर्म मिजाज बावे 
तोहसे उखाड़त कुछ ना राजा रंगबाज़ बावे 
मजा बेसी पइबू खेसरिया कमीना हो कमीना हS कमीना में 
चोली भिज जाता राजा जी पसीना में 
लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में

लहंगा लस-लस करे फागुन के महीना में

snippet.title: Billie Eilish - BIRDS OF A FEATHER (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🍃 Billie Eilish - BIRDS OF A FEATHER (Lyrics)
🌎Download / Stream: https://open.spotify.com/track/6dOtVTDdiauQNBQEDOtlAB 
💚Help us reach 50.000 subscribers!💚

🌸Billie Eilish
https://www.facebook.com/billieeilish
https://x.com/billieeilish

💚 Lyrics:  Billie Eilish - BIRDS OF A FEATHER
[Verse 1]
I want you to stay
'Til I'm in the grave
'Til I rot away, dead and buried
'Til I'm in the casket you carry
If you go, I'm goin' too, uh
'Cause it was always you (Alright)
And if I'm turnin' blue, please don't save me
Nothin' left to lose without my baby

[Refrain]
Birds of a feather, we should stick together, I know
I said I'd never think I wasn't better alone
Can't change the weather, might not be forever
But if it's forever, it's even better

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't know what I'm cryin' for
I don't think I could love you more
It might not be long, but baby, I

[Chorus]
I'll love you 'til the day that I die
'Til the day that I die
'Til the light leaves my eyes
'Til the day that I die
See Billie Eilish Live
Get tickets as low as $225

You might also like
Houdini
Eminem
True Blue (Demo)
Billie Eilish
She Knows
J. Cole

[Verse 2]
I want you to see, hm
How you look to me, hm
You wouldn't believe if I told ya
You would keep the compliments I throw ya
But you're so full of shit, uh
Tell me it's a bit, oh
Say you don't see it, your mind's polluted
Say you wanna quit, don't be stupid

[Pre-Chorus]
And I don't know what I'm cryin' for
I don't think I could love you more
It might not be long, but baby, I
Don't wanna say goodbye

[Chorus]
Birds of a feather, we should stick together, I know ('Til the day that I die)
I said I'd never think I wasn't better alone ('Til the light leaves my eyes)
Can't change the weather, might not be forever ('Til the day that I die)
But if it's forever, it's even better

[Post-Chorus]
I knew you in another life
You had that same look in your eyes
I love you, don't act so surprised

snippet.title: Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe Official Video Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya #bollywood #hindisong #2026
snippet.description:
Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe (Official Video ) (Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya) || Romantic Bollywood Hits Song 2026
Dil Ne Tera Naam Liya 2.0 💞 90s Bollywood Romantic Vibe | Soulful New Version

Song - Teri Yaadon Ki Chadar Odhe


तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,
तेरे बिना हर धड़कन में, बस गूँजता है तेरा सिलसिला।
तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,
तेरी तस्वीर आँखों में, फिर भी आँखें भीग जाती हैं।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे होंठों की मुस्कान में, मैंने खुदा का नूर देखा,
तेरे आँचल की छाँव में, सारा सुकून देखा।
तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,
तेरी खामोशी भी अब तो, मेरी रूह को सजा देती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी तेरी बातें याद आईं, तो दिल मुस्कुरा उठा,
कभी तेरी दूरी ने छू लिया, तो दिल बिखर उठा।
तेरे बिना जो जीना पड़ा, वो जीना ना रहा,
तेरे बिना हर लम्हा मेरा, अधूरा-सा रहा।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे जाने के बाद भी, तेरा एहसास रहता है,
हर शाम तेरी यादों का, साया पास रहता है।
तेरे ख़त के अक्षर अब भी, महकते हैं जैसे फूल,
तेरे नाम से ही चलती हैं, मेरी हर मंज़िल की धूल।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरी आँखों में जो गहराई है, उसमें मेरा जहाँ है,
तेरे इश्क़ की पनाहों में, मेरी पहचान है।
तेरी राहों में बिछ जाऊँ, अगर तू मुस्कुराए,
तेरी ख़ुशी में अपनी हर सांस, मैं कुर्बान कर जाऊँ।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

कभी खामोशी में तेरा नाम लूँ, तो आँसू चल पड़ते हैं,
कभी तेरे ख़्वाबों में खो जाऊँ, तो लम्हे थम पड़ते हैं।
तेरे जाने के बाद भी, दिल तुझसे बातें करता है,
हर तन्हा रात में अब भी, तेरा ही ज़िक्र करता है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

अब बस इतना कह दूँ तुझसे, लौट आ किसी बहाने,
तेरे बिना ये दिल मेरा, टूटे पत्ते जैसा दीवाने।
तेरे प्यार में ही तो मेरी, दुनिया पूरी होती है,
तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

दिल ने तेरा नाम लिया, हर साँस ने तेरा नाम लिया… (2)

तेरे आने से ही मेरी, ज़िंदगी रोशन होती है।

तेरे बिना सूना है जहाँ, तेरे बिना तन्हा है दिल,

तेरी यादों की चादर ओढ़े, हर रात गुज़र जाती है,

तेरी आवाज़ में वो मिठास है, जो साजों को जगा देती है,

snippet.title: 🎵 Lana Del Rey - Cinnamon Girl (Lyrics)
snippet.description:
🎵 Lana Del Rey - Cinnamon Girl (Lyrics)
⏬ Descargar: https://lana.lnk.to/NFR

🎤 Lyrics: Lana Del Rey - Cinnamon Girl

[Verse 1]
Cinnamon in my teeth
From your kiss, you're touching me
All the pills that you take
Violet, blue, green, red to keep me at arm's length don't work
You try to push me out, but I just find my way back in
Violet, blue, green, red to keep me out, I win

[Chorus]
There's things I wanna say to you
But I'll just let you live
Like if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did
There's things I wanna talk about
But better not to give
But if you hold me without hurting me
You'll be the first who ever did

[Post-Chorus]
Ah, ah, ah, ah, ah, ah
Hold me, love me, touch me, honey
Be the first who ever did
Ah, ah, ah, ah, ah, ah
Hold me, love me, touch me, honey
Be the first who ever did

Kerosene in my hands
You make me mad, on fire again

With qualification on the line, every match becomes a test of composure, adaptability, and decision-making. Teams are pushing harder, knowing that consistency and crucial moments will decide who moves forward. Expect high-pressure battles, decisive plays, and gameplay shaped by the stakes of the stage. This is where the race tightens and the journey to the Quarterfinals takes form.

hi.title: हमने जंगल में बंदूकधारियों के रूप में 99 रातें बिताईं 😱 | Roblox
hi.description:
नए वीडियो के लिए सब्सक्राइब करें

कल 22 फरवरी, शाम ठीक 6 बजे हम Unacademy ऐप पर लाइव होंगे।

लाइवस्ट्रीम से जुड़ने के लिए इस लिंक पर क्लिक करें:
https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/q5bz29bu

और हां, "नोटिफाई मी" बटन दबा देना ताकि आप इसे मिस न करें।

कल मिलते हैं! 🌚

🤗 मुझे इंस्टाग्राम पर फॉलो करें: ​https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

आशा है आपको वीडियो पसंद आया होगा। अगर पसंद आया तो कृपया वीडियो को लाइक और शेयर करें।

कॉपीराइट अधिनियम 1976 की धारा 107 के तहत कॉपीराइट अस्वीकरण, आलोचना, टिप्पणी, समाचार रिपोर्टिंग, शिक्षण, छात्रवृत्ति, शिक्षा और अनुसंधान जैसे उद्देश्यों के लिए "उचित उपयोग" की अनुमति देता है।

उचित उपयोग कॉपीराइट कानूनों द्वारा अनुमत एक उपयोग है जो अन्यथा उल्लंघनकारी हो सकता है।

id.title: Kami Bertahan Hidup Selama 99 Malam di Hutan sebagai Penembak Jitu😱| Roblox
id.description:
Silakan Berlangganan untuk Video Baru

Besok, 22 Februari, pukul 18.00 tepat, kami akan LIVE di aplikasi Unacademy.

Untuk bergabung dengan siaran langsung, klik tautan ini:
https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/q5bz29bu

Dan ya, tekan "Beri Tahu Saya" agar Anda tidak ketinggalan.

Sampai jumpa besok! 🌚

🤗 Ikuti Saya di Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

Semoga Anda menikmati video ini. Jika ya, silakan sukai & bagikan video ini.

Pernyataan Penafian Hak Cipta berdasarkan pasal 107 Undang-Undang Hak Cipta tahun 1976, izin diberikan untuk "penggunaan wajar" untuk tujuan seperti kritik, komentar, pelaporan berita, pengajaran, beasiswa, pendidikan, dan penelitian.

Penggunaan wajar adalah penggunaan yang diizinkan oleh undang-undang hak cipta yang mungkin melanggar hak cipta.

El 22 de febrero, a las 6 p. m. en punto, estaremos EN VIVO en la app de Unacademy.

Únete a la transmisión en vivo. Haz clic en el enlace: https://unacademy.onelink.me/M2BR/q5bz29bu

Aquí tienes, presiona "Notificarme" para no perderte nada.

¡Milte hain kal! 🌚

🤗 Sígueme en Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/gamerfleetog/

Espero que hayas disfrutado el video. Si es así, dale a "me gusta" y compártelo.

Descargo de responsabilidad por derechos de autor: Según la sección 107 de la Ley de Derechos de Autor de 1976, se permite el "uso legítimo" para fines como críticas, comentarios, noticias, enseñanza, becas, educación e investigación.

El uso legítimo es un uso permitido por las leyes de derechos de autor que, de otro modo, podría constituir una infracción.

snippet.title: Main Hoon | Battle Of Galwan | Salman Khan, Chitrangada | Apoorva L | Shreya G, Ayaan L | Shabbir A
snippet.description:
This Valentine’s Day has its soundtrack. Main Hoon, sung by Shreya Ghoshal and Ayaan Lall, celebrates love in its purest form. A melody that speaks when words fall short, and feelings run deep.

#MainHoon Song Out Now!
#SalmanKhan #BattleOfGalwan 

Full Song Available on:

Spotify -  https://bit.ly/4twW4ZH
YouTube Music  - https://bit.ly/4rs811d
Jio Saavn - https://bit.ly/3Zy4Rgb
Amazon Music - https://bit.ly/4rUBd0M
Apple Music - https://bit.ly/4arae7f
Gaana - https://bit.ly/3O8vC8B

Song Credits:
Music : Ayaan Lall
Composer: Ayaan Lall
Singer : Shreya Ghoshal & Ayaan Lall 
Lyrics : Shabbir Ahmed & Ayaan Lall
Music Production : Vaibhav Pani
Guitars : Ishan Das
Flute & Woodwinds : Shriram Sampath
Recording Engineer Vocals (Ayaan Lall) : Pranjal Borah @ Neo Sound

snippet.title: MAKHAMALI | PARESH RAI | RACHANA RIMAL | RAJU KARKI | GUNARAJ KATUWAL
snippet.description:
MAKHAMALI | Paresh Rai | Rachana Rimal | New Nepali Song

“MAKHAMALI” is a beautifully crafted Nepali song blending soulful vocals with refined musical arrangement and heartfelt lyrics. The song brings together powerful voices and expert production to deliver an emotional and melodious listening experience.

🎤 Vocal: Paresh Rai | Rachana Rimal
✍️ Lyrics: Gunaraj Katuwal
🎶 Compose | Arrange | Mix | Master: Raju Karki
🎧 Recordist: Suresh Payel Rai
🏢 Studio: King

This song reflects love, emotion, and musical depth through expressive lyrics and polished sound design. Enjoy the melody and don’t forget to like, share, and subscribe for more Nepali music.

#Makhmali #PareshRai #RachanaRimal #NepaliSong #NewNepaliSong #RajuKarki #GunarajKatuwal #KingStudio

snippet.description:
सोमवार भक्ति भजन - आशुतोष शशाँक शेखर, कर्पूर गौरम करुणावतारं, ॐ नमः शिवाय,  शिव अमृतवाणी व शिव आरती

ॐ नम शिवाय

महामृत्युंजय मंत्र             
शिव अमृतवाणी          
शिव स्वर्णमाला स्तुति                  
ॐ जय शिव ओंकारा

Sundaichas Geet, Pokhara Ko Hune Wala Mayor Bata…

snippet.title: MAA KA BALIDAN Full Movie (HD) - माँ का बलिदान - Rani Chatterjee - Rakesh Babu - New Movie 2026 Amma
snippet.description:
#b4uclassics #ranichatterjee #rakeshbabu #shwetaverma #ayazkhan #kanchansashi #prakashjais #amma #bhojpurimovie #bhojpuri #BhojpuriFilm #BhojpuriPicture #भोजपुरी #भोजपुरीफिल्म #भोजपुरीपिक्चर #movie #film #bhojpurisong #bhojpurivideo #khesarilalyadav #pawansingh

 IVY ENTERTAINMENT PRESENTS IN ASSOCIATION WITH HIGH IQ ENTERTAINMENT LLP 

फ़िल्म - अम्मा

कलाकार - रानी  चटर्जी  , राकेश  बाबू  , श्वेता  वर्मा , अयाज़  खान  ,  कंचन  मिश्रा  , प्रकाश  जैस , रूपा  सिंह , वंदना  दुबे
बाल कलाकार –, ईशान , 
कांसेप्ट - संदीप सिंह
निर्देशक – अजीत कुमार
लेखक - अरबिंद तिवारी
संगीतकार- साजन मिश्रा
गीतकार - अरबिंद तिवारी, 
संकलन - नागेंद्र
छायांकन- विजय मंडल
कोरियोग्राफर - कानू मुख़र्जी , सोनू प्रीतम
आर्ट डायरेक्टर - संजय कुमार
निर्माता - संदीप सिंह, अरविन्द कुमार अग्रवाल
म्यूजिक,सॅटॅलाइट और डिजिटल पार्टनर - B4U भोजपुरी


B4U क्रिएटिव टीम – मारुद शर्मा, नेहा उपाध्याय , विशाल यादव
B4U लीगल - संदीप राणा , तृष्णा पटेल , पूनम शिंदे , आकांक्षा वाकोडे – मोरे ऑफिस बॉय – कन्हैया झा
IVY – एंटरटेनमेंट -  फाइनेंस 
प्रदीप के दागा , जिनेले मैस्करेन्हास , विपुल जैन , निवृत्ति पाटिल , गणेश महादेव टापरे , हिमांशु चौधरी

B4U - फाइनेंस
संतोष गर्ग , रविंदर साल्वी , साक्षी शैलार

HIGH IQ टीम –
कार्यकारी निर्माता  - सुभाष चव्हाण
पोस्ट प्रोडक्शन मैनेजर - गौरव उमेश शर्मा 
रशेस एंड डाटा मैनेजमेंट - भीकू वांगने 
अकाउंटेंट - प्रणवी नारे , राहुल नायडू 
चार्टर्ड अकाउंटेंट - दर्शन भारत शाह 
प्रोडक्शन रनर बॉय - नन्दकुमार सवलेकर

FILM- AMMA
STARCAST- RANI CHATTERJEE , RAKESH BABU , SHWETA VERMA, AYAZ KHAN ,  KANCHAN MISHRA , PRAKASH JAIS, RUPA SINGH, VANDANA DUBEY,

लो-फाई भजन पारंपरिक भक्ति संगीत को लो-फाई संगीत के सुखदायक, उदासीन गुणों के साथ जोड़ता है। इसमें शांत धुन और कोमल लय होती है जो शांति और आध्यात्मिक चिंतन की भावना पैदा करती है। वाद्य-यंत्र में अक्सर तबला, हारमोनियम, सितार और बांसुरी जैसे ध्वनिक वाद्य शामिल होते हैं, जो विनाइल क्रैकल या परिवेशी ध्वनियों जैसे सूक्ष्म लो-फाई तत्वों पर परतदार होते हैं। स्वर, चाहे एकल हों या कोरस, दिल से भावनाओं के साथ भक्ति गीत प्रस्तुत करते हैं, जो एक ध्यानपूर्ण और चिंतनशील मूड को प्रोत्साहित करते हैं। यह संलयन एक अनूठा सुनने का अनुभव बनाता है जो प्राचीन आध्यात्मिक परंपराओं को समकालीन लो-फाई सौंदर्यशास्त्र के साथ मिलाता है, जो आंतरिक सद्भाव और श्रद्धा में एक शांत यात्रा प्रदान करता है।

A lo-fi bhajan combines traditional devotional music with the soothing, nostalgic qualities of lo-fi music. It features serene melodies and gentle rhythms that evoke a sense of peace and spiritual contemplation. The instrumentation often includes acoustic instruments like tabla, harmonium, sitar, and flute, layered over subtle lo-fi elements such as vinyl crackles or ambient sounds. The vocals, whether solo or in chorus, deliver devotional lyrics with heartfelt emotion, encouraging a meditative and reflective mood. This fusion creates a unique listening experience that merges ancient spiritual traditions with contemporary lo-fi aesthetics, offering a tranquil journey into inner harmony and reverence.

It features serene melodies and gentle rhythms that evoke a sense of peace and spiritual contemplation. The instrumentation often includes acoustic instruments like tabla, harmonium, sitar, and flute, layered over subtle lo-fi elements such as vinyl crackles or ambient sounds. The vocals, whether solo or in chorus, deliver devotional lyrics with heartfelt emotion, encouraging a meditative and reflective mood. This fusion creates a unique listening experience that merges ancient spiritual traditions with contemporary lo-fi aesthetics, offering a tranquil journey into inner harmony and reverence.

snippet.title: Meri Ujeli (Official Music Video) -  Pahenlo Batti Muni
snippet.description:
Meri Ujeli is an ode to the brightness and warmth we’ve received from all those we have loved and those who have loved us. 

Stream the HQ Audio here: https://silentroar.ffm.to/meriujeli-pbm

Lyrics:
आकाशले त्यागेको पानीको नि
साथी बनिदिने इन्द्रेणी

जङ्गल खरानी भएपछि
टुसाउँछ जुन फूल बसन्त बनी

तिमी, तिमी,
तिमी, तिमी

शहरको चर्‍को कोलाहललाई
चिरेर गाउने सुस्केरी
गल्ली-गल्लीभित्रका चोकसरी
एक पहेली हौ, नयाँ दुनियाँ पनि

तिमी, तिमी,
तिमी, तिमी

बसन्तको गोँधूलीको अँगालोसरी
न्यानो छौ तिमी
मेरी उजेली

जूनकी सङ्गिनी, बगैँचाझैँ रङ्गीली,
कथाझैँ छौ तिमी, मेरी उजेली

मेरी उजेली तिमी, मेरी उजेली
मेरी उजेली तिमी, तिमी मेरी उजेली

🎤 Lyrics: French Montana - Unforgettable ft. Swae Lee

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
It's not gonna work for you
Nobody can equal me (I know)
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm f***ed up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peep'd you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone (Ooh)
Why not? A f***in' good time never hurt nobody
I got a little drink but it's not Bacardi
If you loved the girl, then I'm so, so sorry
I gotta give it to her like we in a marriage
Oh, like we in a hurry
No, no, I won't tell nobody
You're on your level too
Tryna do what lovers do
[Verse 1: French Montana]
Feelin' like I'm fresh out; Boosie (Boosie)
If they want the drama, got the Uzi (Uzi)
Ship the whole crew to the cruise ship (Cruise)
Doin' s*** you don't even see in movies (Movies)
Ride with me, ride with me, boss (Boss)
I got a hard head, but her ass soft (Soft)
She want the last name with the ring on it
'Cause I pulled out a million cash, told her plank on it

[Refrain: Swae Lee & French Montana]
And you are unforgettable
I need to get you alone
Now you wanna choose
Just pop the bubbly in the 'cuzi

[Chorus: Swae Lee]
It's not good enough for me
Since I've been with you, ooh
I'm gonna sip on this drink, when I'm f**ed up
I should know how to pick up
I'm gonna catch the rhythm
While she push up against me, ooh, and she tipsy
I had enough convo for 24
I peep'd you from across the room
Pretty little body dancin' like GoGo, hey
And you are unforgettable

So, you don't ever hurt nobody

snippet.title: Tamang Selo - Figure Timro Dami · फिगर तिम्रो दामी - Official MV
snippet.description:
https://www.tiktok.com/@kumarbmzn  https://www.facebook.com/Kumarbmzntamang 

“𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” · 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 | 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿 | 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻 | Ashish Manandhar | Rasmila Tamang.

          After the amazing response to the “𝗙𝗶𝗴𝘂𝗿𝗲 𝗧𝗶𝗺𝗿𝗼 𝗗𝗮𝗺𝗶” 𝗔𝘂𝗱𝗶𝗼 𝗦𝗼𝗻𝗴, we are excited to present the 𝗢𝗳𝗳𝗶𝗰𝗶𝗮𝗹 𝗠𝘂𝘀𝗶𝗰 𝗩𝗶𝗱𝗲𝗼. This release is a result of the immense love, support, and encouragement from all our viewers and listeners. We hope you enjoy this visual presentation just as much as you enjoyed the audio. Your continuous support motivates us to create more music and creative content in the future.
       
This music video features 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 and 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿 in the lead roles. Ashish Manandhar is a highly talented dancer, experienced dance instructor, and versatile model. The video highlights 𝘃𝗶𝗿𝗮𝗹 𝘀𝘁𝗲𝗽 𝗱𝗮𝗻𝗰𝗲 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝘆 𝗰𝗿𝗲𝗮𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗔𝘀𝗵𝗶𝘀𝗵 𝗠𝗮𝗻𝗮𝗻𝗱𝗵𝗮𝗿, which has become a major attraction of the song. Representing the Tamang community, 𝗥𝗮𝘀𝗺𝗶𝗹𝗮 𝗧𝗮𝗺𝗮𝗻𝗴 is a beautiful and hardworking model, widely recognized for her impressive performances in popular music videos. The music video is 𝗰𝗵𝗼𝗿𝗲𝗼𝗴𝗿𝗮𝗽𝗵𝗲𝗱 𝗮𝗻𝗱 𝗱𝗶𝗿𝗲𝗰𝘁𝗲𝗱 𝗯𝘆 𝗠𝗮𝘂𝘀𝗮𝗺 𝗛𝗶𝗺𝗮𝗹𝗶, an accomplished director known for delivering several superhit Nepali songs. 
     
🎤 This is also the 𝗳𝗶𝗿𝘀𝘁-𝗲𝘃𝗲𝗿 𝗱𝘂𝗲𝘁 𝘀𝗼𝗻𝗴 𝗯𝘆 𝗕𝗶𝘀𝗵𝘄𝗼 𝗗𝗼𝗻𝗴 and 𝗦𝗵𝗮𝗻𝘁𝗶 𝗦𝗵𝗿𝗲𝗲 𝗣𝗮𝗿𝗶𝘆𝗮𝗿, with the song written by 𝗞𝘂𝗺𝗮𝗿 𝗕𝗼𝗺𝗷𝗮𝗻, making it a special and memorable collaboration for everyone involved.

🎧 Enjoy the perfect blend of a catchy melody, dancing vibe, witty lyrics, and pure Nepali vibes.
